title: nephrodium globuliferum
intro: Nephrodium globuliferum, a type of fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium globuliferum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water or boiling them in a liquid to release their medicinal properties.
